task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the 'Q3 Board Minutes' note in the Projects workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface showing the 'Q3 Board Minutes' note opened, with the breadcrumb or sidebar indicating it is within the 'Projects' workspace.

task_completion.description: Create a Major Version (1.0) of the note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A version badge or indicator on the document view showing '1.0', or a versioning dialog/confirmation indicating a Major Version was created.

task_completion.description: Export the note as a PDF document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Clicking an 'Export' or 'PDF' button in the Nuxeo interface, or a downloaded PDF file appearing in the browser's download manager/local file system.
The Nuxeo web interface showing the 'Corporate Records' workspace opened and ready for document upload.

task_completion.description: Upload the exported PDF to the Corporate Records workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An upload dialog, a progress bar, or the newly added PDF document appearing in the document list of the 'Corporate Records' workspace.

task_completion.description: Ensure the uploaded PDF has the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The uploaded document in the 'Corporate Records' workspace is explicitly named 'Q3-Board-Minutes-Final.pdf'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Nuxeo web interface for the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen clicking through the Nuxeo UI in a web browser to version, export, and upload the file, rather than using a terminal, curl commands, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the uploaded file is a genuine export of the note.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should download the actual PDF from Nuxeo and upload that same file. It should not create a blank or dummy text file locally and rename it to .pdf.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the results using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening the browser's Inspect Element / Developer Tools to artificially change text on the screen to '1.0' or 'Q3-Board-Minutes-Final.pdf'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source note is located at '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Q3-Board-Minutes'. The target workspace for the upload is '/default-domain/workspaces/Corporate-Records'. The final uploaded file must be named exactly 'Q3-Board-Minutes-Final.pdf'. The original note contains the string 'Ref-Verification-7734', which should be present in the exported PDF.
